summary: Controller spec review allows HARBOR-241 at the current implementation boundary: an active interactive managed session opened or reused for the user is the required trust transition before supervisor-authorized confirmation can persist a redacted public identity fact. The scope still excludes automatic login, sensitive-material inspection, site execution, and all external writes. Packaged-App live evidence remains a post-merge closeout requirement.
reviewed_validation_summary: 2026-07-10T10:32Z on `work/harbor-241-live-auth-sync`: `pnpm install --offline --frozen-lockfile`, `pnpm typecheck`, focused manual-authentication test (43 passed), and `git diff --check` passed. Full `pnpm test` observed two concurrent local-provider timing failures; the isolated persistent-profile and stale-DevTools-port regressions both passed. A real local official-Chrome Xiaohongshu session was active with user control, but its confirmation failed because direct user session open/reuse did not mark the interactive session user-held.
follow_ups: Live user-session evidence is required for issue closeout but is not a substitute for this API/spec review.
